title: columnea selloana
intro: Columnea selloana, also known as the hummingbird flower or bird flower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Columnea selloana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
